programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A young woman Kathleen Lloyd working at Hart Industries becomes obsessed with her boss Jonathan and mimics Jennifers appearance to replace her

programme.title: Cagney and Lacey
programme.desc: A mans apparent suicide is just the tip of the iceberg When his wife and daughter confess to his murder in order to protect each other Cagney and Lacey must determine the guilty one in order to prosecute

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: After Starsky shoots a 16-year-old armed robber a crazed ex-con vows to kill uniformed policemen until Starsky resigns from the force

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Dom uses Airwolf to transport a heart to Chicago and responds to a mayday along the way for a downed private plane The plane belongs to billionaire Carl Barron who was on his way to a board meeting when his plane developed engine difficulties Barron attempts to bribe Santini into dropping him off first then the heart Dom refuses and gives Barron a piece of his mind instead Shortly thereafter Barron is killed in a mysterious explosion at his company and everyone at the funeral is shocked to learn that he altered his will just before he died Dominic Santini is named as the recipient of a substantial piece of the Barron fortune and several of Barrons employees are not happy about it

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Using a cursed pen a pulp writer transforms himself into an acclaimed novelist who is known for getting inside the minds of serial killers

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When Matt and Froy go missing Sonia is on a mission to figure out what theyve got up their sleeves

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy repo a hummer from a bachelorette who is down to party but when the cops arrive its the repo team who is in for a shock

programme.title: Round up Time in Texas
programme.desc: Gene and Frog arrive with a herd of horses for Genes brother a diamond prospector whose work has attracted the interest of a bunch of bad guys

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: Broken Arrow

programme.title: Addams 201
programme.desc: Addams 201

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When the McCoys learn that hometown girl Glory is a Hollywood celebrity Luke fears Kate will be dissatisfied with her life when the McCoys visit her so when Glory comes to visit the McCoy men try to paint Kates life rosier than it is

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: In order to secure a loan from the bank Grampa must sign title to the McCoy farm over to his grandson Luke

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur tries everything from hypnosis to psychiatry in order to cure Ed of his fear of heights

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol has sprained her wrist so Wilbur hires Velma a fantastic cook She even serves carrot pizzas to Ed When Velma announces that shes leaving to find a boyfriend Ed calls her on the phone and pretends to be a local secret admirer

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A prison wagon stops at the McCain ranch One of the guards asks Lucas for a bottle of alcohol He refuses Later the guards return and take Lucas prisoner

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark gets a job from a neighbor who he initialed shied away from because of his facial scars When his military past is revealed Mark has to decide if his new friend has been lying or is the man on his trail seeking vengeance justified

programme.title: Gunsmoke S07E30 The Dreamers
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S07E30 The Dreamers

programme.title: Bonanza 313
programme.desc: Bonanza 313

programme.title: West 313
programme.desc: West 313

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon go undercover at a hotel to find the location of an illegal gambling operation Soon after spreading the word theyre looking for some action they are driven to a late-night game in the Hollywood Hills After the game the detectives give the location of the residence to their boss and a raid is set for the following night

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon have less than two hours to find the dog that bit a little girl five days earlier Normally treatment consists of serum injections followed by vaccine inoculations but in this case the girl is highly allergic to the anti-rabies serum and it could kill her

programme.title: The Fugitive S02E13
programme.desc: The Fugitive S02E13

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A washed up newspaper editor is given the story of a lifetime However he soon finds out that the newspaper tells the future and sees an article about him committing suicide

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A psychic clown and part-time cook who abuses his assistant and wife learns that she is having an affair with a fire eater and plans to runs off with him

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A hot-tempered convict with a butter addiction tries to get revenge with the help of his mentally challenged brother on the ice cream trucker who was responsible for his arrest unaware the driver also has a dark secret too

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A sculptor uses a drifter and his own abused girlfriend to recreate a murdersuicide

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Smarmy and opportunistic reality TV show host Jerry Rulac does an expose on the wild punk nightclub scene for the latest segment of his television program Why Are You Here Jerry uncovers more than he bargained for when he decides to focus on troubled wealthy party girl Donette and her unpredictable gaggle of scary friends

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: The next of kin to the citys biggest crime family is determined to leave the family business to live a normal life However family ties are not easily broken and LaCroix is sought for his help

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki waits tables in a seedy bar in an attempt to retrieve a cursed pool cue that enables the owner to win every game

programme.title: Tarantulas The Deadly Cargo
programme.desc: Townsfolk unite against spiders freed from a crashed planes coffee-bean cargo

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A Springwood High student is summoned to the principals office and begins having nightmares leading him to the schools surprising secret Another student dreams about failing his SATs

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways discover that a celebrated eccentric artist is on the island and they try to trick him into wanting to return to civilization so that they can use his transmitter

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Little Luke writes an essay revealing a secret about Grampa

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Lukes recently married henpecked cousin Charlie and his wife come to visit

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS threatens the USA to dry up its entire water supply CONTROL is temporarily taken over by its original chief Admiral Hardgrade

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS threatens the USA to dry up its entire water supply CONTROL is temporarily taken over by its original chief Admiral Hardgrade

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: All of BJs greatest adversaries are assembled in Las Vegas for a Sheriffs Convention when a criminal gang stages an ambitious and inventive robbery of the Dunes Casino Caught near incriminating evidence BJ is the prime suspect Part I of a three-part epic that continued on The Misadventures of Sheriff Lobo

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gives away Ed to a prospective client in order to secure a home architecture job

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Eds having paternal feelings so he talks Wilbur into adopting a little pony as a son for him

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans Heroes

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan sneaks out of camp to a local German Hofbrau House to get the details of a nearby German army unit

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When a Photographer with an attitude is assigned to the 73 Crew McHale and The Boys must work up a plan to get rid of her

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Ashamed of his desk job Binghamton assumes command of the 73 during McHales absence and takes it out on a combat mission so that he can have a war story to share with his battle-hardened fellow Officers

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After a pay phone spits out 4175 in coins Duke and Frankie are ecstatic about all the fun they can have spending it but good Samaritan Gomer is determined to return it to the phone company

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Duke Slater wins amateur comedy night at the Jade Club Dukes act is impressions with his feature on Sgt Carter the best part of his act Against all common sense and his friends advice Gomer invites Carter to Dukes encore performance

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Latin American dictator is exiled to the island and he immediately declares himself dictator of the island with Gilligan as his puppet leader in training

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: A senator gets photographed in a compromising position with three housewives whose husbands neglect them When one girl is run down by a car its obvious that all three are in danger from a vengeful victim

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: The Harts look forward to lunch with Jennifers friend Marcie and her new spouse Adam Fowler who vanishes and is soon found dead Meanwhile two men who followed him out of the restaurant trail who they think is his wife Jennifer

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Kirk must take a lie detector test to prove his claims that the Minuteman Café was robbed

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: George becomes the joke of the town after he spies a UFO and nobody believes him

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper trains Gilligan to be his replacement leader in case he is captured by savages But when The Skipper is actually captured by savages can Gilligan actually take control

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch Garner and Ryan investigate a family dispute which results in a wife accusing her husband of corporate embezzlement and giving him the reason to erase her The detectives have to find the man before he can carry out his plan

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: The Dukes Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss gets Uncle Jesse to enter a contest for a new type of fossil fuel saying that moonshine is the perfect way to cut down on pollution However Boss has more up his sleeve He plans to tip off the authorities and once Jesse is arrested take credit for the idea himself

programme.title: Hercules 204
programme.desc: Hercules 204

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Bombings begin at embassies and Liam believes they may reignite the SI Sino-Indian War which ended with an armistice several years before An old intelligence agency friend of Renees has interesting holographic technology

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Harrison is kidnapped by a unique modern artist named Quinn whos actually one of the aliens being hunted by his kind Hes mysteriously immune to Earths bacteria so the other aliens want to learn his secret through dissection Quinn wants to set up a dialogue with Earths leaders to arrange a peaceful takeover of the planet as opposed to an all-out slaughter of humanity

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A glimpse into a future devastated by man-made environmental disaster ensures that Senator Parker will take action to prevent it happening - to the best of his ability at least But that may not be enough

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When Dr Arcane dies during a mutation experiment gone wrong Graham accuses Stella of attempting to replace him in the lab by seducing Arcane During their fight Graham falls for Stella conceding that Arcane must have seduced her in mind if not body Their tender moment is ruined however when Graham is alerted to a break-in at the lab its Dr Arcane reduced to his inner beast by the failed experiment Can Graham stop him before tragedy strikes

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Lambda waves permeate Moonbase Alpha causing instruments to malfunction and people to behave out of character Crew member Sally dies in mysterious circumstances Koenig is assailed by guilt-driven visions from his own past It eventually becomes clear that the Lambda Variant has amplified psychic abilities on the base in particular for Carolyn Powell whose lover was previously Sallys boyfriend and who is beset by jealous rage Dr Russell aids Koenig to overcome his own ghosts and prevent Carolyn from taking over the Moonbase

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: When the Comfurt family suddenly strike it rich their car - containing their windfall in a safe locked inside the trunk - is stolen The Dukes track down the car as it changes into the hands of a ruthless bank robber

programme.title: Young Rider
programme.desc: Young Rider

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Young Paul is torn between Lt Stones efforts to take him off the streets and go to college and his brother part of a street gang One day he witnesses the head of the gang committing a murder on an rivaling street gang boss His brother convinces him in joining the gang and to kill Mike Stone who has started to investigate on the murder case in the scene

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The inhabitants of a replica American town are being used themselves as the unknowing carriers of a deadly plague The IM force must stop this from happening and bring the party responsible forward

programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: The police are looking for a young fugitive who was dating the daughter of a Hungarian family that Dr Kimble is staying with As the police stake out their residence Dr Kimble discovers her father is also running from a crime he was accused of

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: When a smooth talking stranger comes to Heath claiming hes his father Heath agrees to travel to the town of his mothers grave to investigate the story

programme.title: Krull
programme.desc: On the planet of Krull an evil creature called the Beast decimates the worlds army and kidnaps the lovely Princess Lyssa Lysette Anthony who is destined to become queen Her brave beau Prince Colwyn Ken Marshall leads a motley band of warriors including Ergo David Battley and Kegan Liam Neeson to rescue his beloved However before he can face the Beast Colwyn must locate a mystical weapon known as the Glaive which he can use to slay the hideous villain

programme.title: The Return of Swamp Thing
programme.desc: The evil Arcanes stepdaughter helps the muck-monster defeat the madman before he can unleash his genetic mutations Based on DC Comics characters

programme.title: Trilogy of Terror
programme.desc: The same woman Karen Black appears in three tales as a blackmailed teacher a tormented lover and opposite sisters

programme.title: Fire Birds
programme.desc: Elite Apache helicopter pilots are tasked with destroying powerful armed drug cartels operating in South America

programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: Hell Boats
programme.desc: An American commander serving under the British Royal Navy in 1942 is assigned to blockade the island of Malta and told to formulate a plan to destroy the Nazi arsenal in Sicily

programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: The Bronx Warriors
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic New York City a policeman infiltrates the Bronx which has become a battleground for several murderous street gangs

programme.desc: DArtagnan and his Musketeer comrades thwart the plans of Cardinal Richelieu to usurp King Louis XIIIs power

programme.title: Tarantulas The Deadly Cargo
programme.desc: Townsfolk unite against spiders freed from a crashed planes coffee-bean cargo

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A Springwood High student is summoned to the principals office and begins having nightmares leading him to the schools surprising secret Another student dreams about failing his SATs

programme.title: Nightbreed
programme.desc: A troubled young man is drawn to a mythical place called Midian where a variety of friendly monsters are hiding from humanity Meanwhile a sadistic serial killer is looking for a patsy

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: Trapped in a missile silo a small team of scientists civilians and trigger-happy soldiers battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race but tension inside the base is reaching breaking-point and the zombies are gathering outside

programme.title: The Hills have Eyes
programme.desc: On the way to California a family has the misfortune to have their car break down in an area closed to the public and inhabited by violent savages ready to attack

programme.title: What Waits Below
programme.desc: An army experiment in submarine communications falls foul of the deadly secret hidden deep within the cave system housing their transmitter

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Noah Ali

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Moktar Benkaci v. Vitaly Branchuk

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Amir Albazi v. Niko Gjoka

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Empress Interview
programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.desc: My family has osterized me for being queer Meet the African princess whose gender preferences has cost her her family

programme.title: The April Taylor Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the lady whose upcoming celebrity tell all book will blow your mind Meet the lovely Ms April Taylor

programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jal Rorda Audrics loyal friend is tricked and captured by Saw Boss where the evil scientist Dr Zorg is zapping him with the mindsifter to discover Audrics whereabouts Jayce defies Saw Boss and goes to the planet Nar to rescue Jal Gorda

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Oon is recalled by the Squire Smith for his obvious fear in the face of Monster Minds Oon fears he will be melted down Upon arriving on the Squire Smiths planet Oon walks into a trap set by Monster Minds He then proves himself to the Squire

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM is firing all the cannonballs on Captain Kidds island to retrieve the gold hidden inside of them Their activity draws the attention of MASK

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: An explorer discovers an ancient Mayan City where giant stones become weightless under the full moonlight He sells this information to Miles Mayhem while Matt Trakker mounts his own excursion to the same location

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out
